title: Midnight Earth Crumble
description: A German-inspired crumbly dessert with a rich flavor profile that hits the perfect midnight craving. This whole30-friendly recipe features earthy elements like dried sherry and brine from pickles, all cooked at safe temperatures to maintain freshness.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine dried sherry and pickled cucumber brine. Mix well.
Add coconut flour, chia seeds, and optional sweetener if using into the mixture. Mix until all ingredients are evenly distributed and no lumps remain.
Transfer crumbly dough onto an ungreased baking sheet. Press firmly to create a flat layer approximately 1/4 inch thick over the entire surface of the pan.
Bake for about 20-25 minutes or until golden brown, stirring halfway through if necessary to ensure even cooking and prevent burning.
Remove from oven when done and allow it to cool on the baking sheet before slicing into portions.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
